title: MCIP LiteratureSource v1
description: Bibliographic metadata and a stable identifier for a paper, book, or web source that may be cited by one or more packets. Lives in a shared catalog (literature_sources/) and is referenced by hash-pinned id, not duplicated per packet — mirrors how restriction_profiles/ works for RestrictionProfile.

packet_id.description: The packet whose review first catalogued this source. Not an ownership restriction — any packet may cite this source by (record_id, record_hash), same as restriction_profiles.

venue.description: Journal, conference, publisher, or site name.

external_ids.description: Stable external identifiers keyed by scheme, e.g. {"url": "...", "arxiv": "2301.00001", "doi": "10.1234/x", "isbn": "..."}.

source_sha256.description: Hash of the archived source content, if retained. Null if only bibliographic metadata is recorded.

access_note.description: e.g. 'publicly accessible web page', 'paywalled, accessed via institutional license'.
